items.summary: Redeploy the backend canister (3m4vr-hiaaa-aaaac-ba7sa-cai) so it is running and can handle query calls. The canister is currently stopped (IC0508), which causes getAllCases and all other backend methods to return Reject code 5. The redeployment must restore the canister to a started state without data loss.

Display a user-friendly error message on the Cases page when the backend is unreachable or returns a canister-stopped error, instead of showing raw rejection details. The message should read 'Unable to connect to the server. Please try again later.' and include a Retry button that re-fetches the cases.
